AutoReleaseInstance.isEipAutoRelatedDelete: Whether the postpaid EIP bound to the instance is automatically released along with the postpaid instance. true: yes, false: no. Takes effect only when the public bandwidth billing method is pay-by-bandwidth or pay-by-traffic. Default: false.
AutoReleaseInstance.releaseTime: Release time in format yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'. If not specified, the scheduled release is cancelled.
